creator: cj@vallcom.net
text:
* Make it so you can optionally build the plugins to save some space
  and some time compiling (perhaps not everyone wants to run AIM or napster with their IRC client)

* Might aswell put all of the default config.h stuff into patch-aj, no point in having
  #define WANT_CHAN_NICK_SERV in the Makefile

Remove patch-ai
Add patch-aj
